scope: wave2 fan-out migration: 2 of legacy's 3 read streams (organizations, k6-tests) are ported at Tier 1. projects is a sub-resource fan-out (read once per organization id) which the declarative dialect cannot express without a Tier-2 StreamHook (out of scope for this wave per docs/migration/conventions.md section 1's Tier-2 trigger list); it keeps its legacy Go implementation. Any other k6 Cloud surface is out of scope until Pass B.

excluded.reason: sub-resource fan-out read (once per organization id) — needs a Tier-2 StreamHook per conventions.md section 1; not implementable in Tier 1 JSON alone. Kept on the legacy Go implementation; see docs.md Known limits
